## Implementation Notes

| Consideration | Recommendation |
|---|---|
| **Pagination** | Add `&_count=200` and follow `Bundle.link[rel=next]` for large populations |
| **Historical meds** | Append `,completed` to `status=active` to include recently-stopped antihypertensives |
| **Inactive diagnoses** | Run a parallel Condition query without `clinical-status=active` to catch resolved/inactive-coded HTN that some EHRs incorrectly mark inactive |
| **Date scoping** | Add `&date=ge2024-01-01` (Observation) or `&onset-date=ge2020-01-01` (Condition) to limit lookback window |
| **Combination drugs** | RxNorm ingredient codes automatically match combination products (e.g., amlodipine/benazepril) since FHIR medication searches traverse ingredient relationships on terminology servers |
| **BP measurement date** | Add `&date=ge2025-05-21` to Query 3.1/3.2 if you only want recent readings for the quality measure period |

## ⚙️ Implementation Notes for Unioning the 3 Populations

```
Final cohort = UNION of:
  patients(Query 1 Conditions)    → extract .subject.reference
  patients(Query 2 MedicationRx)  → extract .subject.reference
  patients(Query 3 Observations)  → extract .subject.reference
```

**Why each approach uniquely contributes:**
| Approach | Catches | Misses |
|---|---|---|
| Dx codes alone | Formally diagnosed patients | Outside-provider prescriptions; undiagnosed but treated patients |
| Meds alone | All treated patients regardless of formal dx | Documented-but-untreated (e.g., dietary-only managed) |
| SBP > 140 alone | Uncontrolled patients even without a code | Controlled patients (BP now < 140) and those without recent vitals |

> ⚠️ **One important caveat on Query 3:** The SBP threshold filter (`gt140`) will **miss patients whose BP is now controlled** (i.e., treated patients whose last reading is ≤ 140). For a **BP control quality initiative**, you likely want *all* patients on treatment regardless of current reading — so Query 2 (meds) is the most actionable denominator, while Query 3 is best used to identify the **numerator of uncontrolled patients** (SBP > 140 despite being on therapy).
